# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket that stores user-uploaded files and application backups. Allow full read/write access for our application IAM role. Keep the configuration simple - we'll add versioning and lifecycle rules in the next iteration.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: S3 bucket for user-uploaded files and application backups with full read/write access for the application IAM role

Parameters:
  BucketName:
    Type: String
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket for storing user uploads and application backups
    AllowedPattern: ^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9.-]*[a-z0-9]$
    ConstraintDescription: Bucket name must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, and periods

  ApplicationRoleArn:
    Type: String
    Description: ARN of the application IAM role that needs full read/write access to the bucket
    AllowedPattern: ^arn:aws:iam::\d{12}:role/.+$
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid IAM role ARN

  Environment:
    Type: String
    Description: Deployment environment
    Default: dev
    AllowedValues:
      - dev
      - staging
      - production

Resources:
  AppStorageBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Ref BucketName
      AccessControl: Private
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: user-uploads-and-backups

  AppStorageBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref AppStorageBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowApplicationRoleFullAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Ref ApplicationRoleArn
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
              - s3:ListBucket
              - s3:GetBucketLocation
              - s3:ListBucketMultipartUploads
              - s3:ListMultipartUploadParts
              - s3:AbortMultipartUpload
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt AppStorageBucket.Arn
              - !Sub "${AppStorageBucket.Arn}/*"
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: "*"
            Action: s3:*
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt AppStorageBucket.Arn
              - !Sub "${AppStorageBucket.Arn}/*"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: "false"

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref AppStorageBucket

  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt AppStorageBucket.Arn

  BucketDomainName:
    Description: Domain name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt AppStorageBucket.DomainName

  ApplicationRoleWithAccess:
    Description: IAM role ARN that has full read/write access to this bucket
    Value: !Ref ApplicationRoleArn
